results.rendered_html:
upanyas 4 P.
1 To lay upon, place or put down, put near, place before.
2 To entrust any one with, commit to the care of.
3 To explain, describe minutely.
4 To propose, suggest, hint, point out, state; mayopanyasteṣu maṃtreṣū  H. 3 ; ityubhayalokāviruddhaṃ vacanamupanyastaṃ  Māl. 2  spoken; sadupanyasyati kṛtyavartma yaḥ  Ki. 2. 3  tells or points out;
(pb) kimidamupanyastaṃ  Ś. 5  what is this that is proposed or said.
5 To prove, establish argumentatively;  Y. 2. 19.
